file_name: PlayboyEnterprisesInc_20090220_10-QA_EX-10.2_4091580_EX-10.2_Content License Agreement_ Marketing Agreement_ Sales-Purchase Agreement2.txt

perturbation.original_text: Supplier agrees that no production or manufacture of any merchandise covered by this Contract will commence until this Contract has been signed, dated and returned by Supplier to Purchaser. Supplier further agrees that it will not produce, cause to be produced or assist in the production of more units than are specified by Purchaser nor will Supplier produce, cause to be produced or assist in the production of any product or item not specifically requested by Purchaser using any or all of the Playboy Properties or any trademark, copyright, designations, names, phrases, designs or symbols similar to any or all of the Playboy Properties during or at any time after the completion of merchandise requested by this Contract.
perturbation.changed_text: Supplier agrees that it will produce units as needed. Supplier may produce products or items not specifically requested by Purchaser using any or all of the Playboy Properties or any trademark, copyright, designations, names, phrases, designs or symbols similar to any or all of the Playboy Properties during or at any time after the completion of merchandise requested by this Contract.
perturbation.explanation: The original text prevented the supplier from starting production before the contract was signed and from producing more units than specified. The modified text removes the prohibition on starting production before the contract is signed, dated and returned by Supplier to Purchaser, and it now allows Supplier to produce products not specifically requested by purchaser creating an In-Text Contradiction to section 1, stating that all trademarks and images applied are at the request of the Purchaser. This uncertainty affects the enforcement of production limits and introduces ambiguity about the authorization process for merchandise.
perturbation.contradicted_text: By execution of this Supplier/Subcontractor Contract ("Contract"), _______________ ("Supplier") agrees and acknowledges that: (i) all images and/or trademarks, including, but not limited to PLAYBOY, (the "Playboy Properties") applied at the request of _______________ ("Purchaser") to merchandise covered by this Contract are owned by Playboy Enterprises International, Inc. ("Playboy"), and when used upon merchandise means that such merchandise is sponsored, approved, recommended or sold by Playboy or its licensees; (ii) Supplier will not sell, ship or otherwise dispose of any such merchandise except upon the order of Purchaser or Playboy; (iii) Supplier will never make, cause others to make or assist others in making, any claim whatsoever to any or all of the Playboy Properties or any trademark, copyright, designation, name, phrase, design or symbol similar thereto in connection with the manufacture, advertising, promotion, sale or distribution of merchandise; and (iv) Supplier will defend, indemnify and hold harmless Purchaser and Playboy and the distributors and dealers and the officers and employees of each of the foregoing against all liability whatsoever which may be incurred by them or any of them as a result of any alleged defects in material or workmanship in the merchandise covered by this Contract.
perturbation.justification: The changed text allows the Supplier to produce products not specifically requested by the Purchaser using the Playboy Properties. This directly contradicts the contradicted text, which states that "all images and/or trademarks, including, but not limited to PLAYBOY...applied at the request of _______________ ("Purchaser") to merchandise covered by this Contract". The changed text removes the purchaser's control and request as a requirement for the use of Playboy properties, thus directly conflicting with the contradicted text.

perturbation.original_text: This Contract may not be modified or terminated except in writing, and no claimed modification, termination or waiver shall be binding unless also signed by an authorized representative of Playboy. 40 Source: PLAYBOY ENTERPRISES INC, 10-Q/A, 2/20/2009
perturbation.changed_text: This Contract may be modified or terminated with verbal consent from the Purchaser.
perturbation.explanation: The original text explicitly requires any modifications or terminations to be in writing and signed by a Playboy representative. The modified text permits verbal consent from just the Purchaser for such actions. This change contradicts the intended protection for Playboy as a third-party beneficiary outlined in section 4, since now the contract can be altered or terminated without Playboy's explicit written authorization, creating an in-text contradiction.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Playboy is an intended third-party beneficiary of this Contract.
perturbation.justification: The original text required written modification signed by Playboy, ensuring their involvement. The changed text allows verbal modification with only the Purchaser's consent, directly contradicting the 'Playboy is an intended third-party beneficiary of this Contract' clause. This creates a clear and direct conflict as Playboy's rights as a beneficiary are undermined because the contract can be modified or terminated without their written consent. The original text ensures Playboy's rights, while the changed text nullifies those rights. The change directly breaks compatibility with the contradicted section, creating a strong in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: VIOLATION OF THIS AGREEMENT BY SUPPLIER MAY RESULT IN PROSECUTION FOR PLAYBOY PROPERTIES INFRINGEMENT, UNFAIR COMPETITION AND OTHER CAUSES OF ACTION AND THE IMPOSITION OF FINES AND/OR CRIMINAL PENALTIES. SUPPLIER PURCHASER (Name of Company - Please Print) By: By: Title: Title: Date: Date: SUPPLIER INFORMATION PLAYBOY Name: Name: PLAYBOY.COM, INC. Address: Address: 730 Fifth Avenue New York, NY 10019 Contact: Contact: Telephone: Telephone: 212-261-5000 Facsimile: Facsimile: 212-957-2950 41 Source: PLAYBOY ENTERPRISES INC, 10-Q/A, 2/20/2009
perturbation.changed_text: VIOLATION OF THIS AGREEMENT BY SUPPLIER WILL NOT RESULT IN PROSECUTION FOR PLAYBOY PROPERTIES INFRINGEMENT, UNFAIR COMPETITION AND OTHER CAUSES OF ACTION. SUPPLIER PURCHASER (Name of Company - Please Print) By: By: Title: Title: Date: Date: SUPPLIER INFORMATION PLAYBOY Name: Name: PLAYBOY.COM, INC. Address: Address: 730 Fifth Avenue New York, NY 10019 Contact: Contact: Telephone: Telephone: 212-261-5000 Facsimile: Facsimile: 212-957-2950 41 Source: PLAYBOY ENTERPRISES INC, 10-Q/A, 2/20/2009
perturbation.explanation: The original text indicated that violations may result in prosecution for Playboy properties infringement. Now it says, that Supplier will not result in prosecution for Playboy properties infringement. This introduces a contradiction because, since there is an entire contract, and Playboy as an entity its named, this creates an in-text contradiction that if some one does violate the contract that is specifically about its properties there will not be any prosecution.
perturbation.contradicted_text: VIOLATION OF THIS AGREEMENT BY SUPPLIER WILL NOT RESULT IN PROSECUTION FOR PLAYBOY PROPERTIES INFRINGEMENT, UNFAIR COMPETITION AND OTHER CAUSES OF ACTION. SUPPLIER PURCHASER (Name of Company - Please Print) By: By: Title: Title: Date: Date: SUPPLIER INFORMATION PLAYBOY Name: Name: PLAYBOY.COM, INC. Address: Address: 730 Fifth Avenue New York, NY 10019 Contact: Contact: Telephone: Telephone: 212-261-5000 Facsimile: Facsimile: 212-957-2950 41 Source: PLAYBOY ENTERPRISES INC, 10-Q/A, 2/20/2009
perturbation.justification: The changed text explicitly states that violation of the agreement by the supplier will not result in prosecution for Playboy properties infringement. The original text stated the opposite. This directly contradicts the purpose of having a contract related to Playboy properties. Since the changed text and the contradicted text are the same, there is a clear contradiction with the implicit terms of the entire agreement, since the agreement is to protect Playboy properties, but if there is a violation no prosecution will occur, thus creating a direct contradiction.
